# validate_strategy_cache_behavior.py

<!-- Generated by scripts/docs/generate_api_docs.py. Do not edit manually. -->

## Purpose

Strict validation for strategy evaluation cache behavior.

## CLI usage

```bash
python scripts/validate/validate_strategy_cache_behavior.py --help
```

## CLI options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Choices | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| --cache-dir | Path | Path('work') / 'fixture_bank' / 'evaluations_validation_tmp' | False |  |  |
| --json-output | Path | None | False |  |  |
| --keep-cache | flag | False | False |  |  |
| --quiet | flag | False | False |  |  |
